version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: 0.72 Release: final publication build for forum/ReaPack (A/B standards workflow, dialogue/cinema presets, UI polish, and release documentation).

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: 0.79 Per-source dialogue gating: moved dialogue meter/gate controls to A/B groups, added dialogue gate presets, and aligned summary/infographics to show only active method data per source. 0.80 Refactor: moved bridge reader logic to Analizer/modules/BridgeReaders.lua and wired source-aware Speech-Gate JSFX reading via module. 0.81 Curve resolution controls: added adjustable curve resolution/scaling for graph detail and responsiveness tuning. 0.82 Render stability pass: fixed multiple graph render/drawing edge cases (overlay/split lanes, clip and redraw behavior, and visual continuity during updates).

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: 0.79 Per-source dialogue gating: moved dialogue meter/gate controls to A/B groups, added dialogue gate presets, and aligned summary/infographics to show only active method data per source. 0.80 Refactor: moved bridge reader logic to Analizer/modules/BridgeReaders.lua and wired source-aware Speech-Gate JSFX reading via module. 0.81 Curve resolution controls: added adjustable curve resolution/scaling for graph detail and responsiveness tuning. 0.82 Render stability pass: fixed multiple graph render/drawing edge cases (overlay/split lanes, clip and redraw behavior, and visual continuity during updates). 0.83 Offline mode update: switched offline analysis path to JSFX bridge reading for post-FX parity with live metering. 0.84 Offline transport safety: auto-disable Repeat during offline pass, restore previous Repeat state after finish/cancel, and keep centered-cursor tracking playhead during playback in Offline mode.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: 0.85 ReaPack index update: + Added missing Analyzer module sources for workflow indexing: - modules/AlertEngine.lua - modules/BridgeReaders.lua - modules/SummaryEngine.lua + Added SpeechGate bridge JSFX package in JSFX category.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: 0.79 Per-source dialogue gating: moved dialogue meter/gate controls to A/B groups, added dialogue gate presets, and aligned summary/infographics to show only active method data per source. 0.80 Refactor: moved bridge reader logic to Analizer/modules/BridgeReaders.lua and wired source-aware Speech-Gate JSFX reading via module. 0.81 Curve resolution controls: added adjustable curve resolution/scaling for graph detail and responsiveness tuning. 0.82 Render stability pass: fixed multiple graph render/drawing edge cases (overlay/split lanes, clip and redraw behavior, and visual continuity during updates). 0.83 Offline mode update: switched offline analysis path to JSFX bridge reading for post-FX parity with live metering. 0.84 Offline transport safety: auto-disable Repeat during offline pass, restore previous Repeat state after finish/cancel, and keep centered-cursor tracking playhead during playback in Offline mode. 0.85 Graph reset UX: added right-click on graph to clear analyzer history and send reset/reinit commands to Speech Gate Bridge and Cockos Loudness Meter. 0.86 Speech Bridge option: added UI checkbox to control JSFX "Reset on Playback Start" behavior for source tracks. 0.87 Loudness Meter reset fix: "Reset on Playback Start" checkbox now targets Cockos Loudness Meter too, and graph right-click uses stronger reinit trigger sequence. 0.88 Cockos meter compatibility fix: corrected Reset on Playback Start index (slider11/cfg_reinit) and removed forced auto-off override from bridge configuration. 0.89 Cockos reset trigger: right-click reset now targets dedicated reset/reinit parameter (excluding playback-start toggle), with offline/enable fallback.

reapack.name: sbp_PhantomFollower.jsfx
reapack.desc: SBP Phantom Follower - 5.1 Position Follower with Pseudo-Acoustics

version.author: (SBP)
version.changelog: v1.0 - Initial release. Follow Phantom Center coordinates with VBAP/Amplitude panning, coordinate transforms, deadzone filtering, and frequency-based pseudo-acoustics.

version.author: Sergey Bondarev (SBP)
version.changelog: v1.0 - Initial release. Follow Phantom Center coordinates with VBAP/Amplitude panning, coordinate transforms, deadzone filtering, and frequency-based pseudo-acoustics.

metadata.description: Bridge JSFX for Cine Loudness Analyzer dialogue/speech-gate workflow integration.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: 1.0.0 Initial ReaPack publication of SpeechGate bridge JSFX for analyzer workflow integration.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: 1.1.0 Added manual reset trigger, reset-on-playback-start option, and compatibility updates for analyzer-driven reset workflows.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v1.0 - Initial release: Professional 5.1 surround analyzer with real-time heat map visualization, 10-pair goniometer with phase correlation, ITU-R BS.1770-4 calibrated LUFS meters.

reapack.name: sbp_Chord Voicing Editor.lua
reapack.desc: Chord Voicing Editor v23.3 (Clean & Perfect Strum)

version.author: SBP
version.changelog: v1.12.6 - Consolidated update: refined exhaust-type separation with anti-comb/flanger guards for low/high cylinder engines, added Exhaust Rasp Amount control (slider90), reduced cabin-perspective exhaust rasp and under-hood mechanical dominance for more natural Cabin/Exterior behavior.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v1.24.7 - Auto Routing fix: when building output group folder, source MotorSynth track now disables Master/Parent send to prevent duplicated 1/2 output alongside routed child tracks.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v0.95 (2026-03-04) + Added MIDI CC Modulation Support (MIDI Editor & Track Envelopes) + Real-time modulation for MIDI Editor CC lanes (modwheel, pitch, etc.) + "Bake" support for MIDI takes (Piano Roll) + Automatic target detection for MIDI CC Track Envelopes + UI feedback for active MIDI targets in Sel.Env mode + increased Rate ranges for LFOs

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v0.96 (2026-03-05) + Fixed dont't work Tack Volume and Pan modulation targets in Link mode.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v0.97 (2026-03-25) + External Mixer: fixed center volume dip for 4-corner morphing. + Switched corner mix mapping to equal-power gain with proper JSFX dB slider conversion.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v0.5.1 (2026-03-26): + Fixed One-Shot live monitoring pitch reset: moving sliders now preserves current MIDI trigger note instead of falling back to base drone pitch. + Added explicit JSFX playback-state reset hook for preset/morph/randomize/profile transitions. + Improved manual-tweak behavior after loading User Preset: first direct synth edit detaches from loaded preset state.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v0.5.0 (2026-03-25): + User Morph (A/B + Mix) between user presets. + Batch Render with auto-naming and randomize-per-item workflow. + One-Shot render stability: temporary MIDI trigger injection for Print/Batch. + Sequential Batch No-mode placement with configurable Gap ms. + One-Shot MIDI Ctrl popup (pitch/velocity/length with optional random ranges). + Auto-fit render range to One-Shot MIDI note length (when no Time Selection). + Context tooltips and quickstart documentation updates.

reapack.name: sbp_MagicDress.jsfx
reapack.desc: SBP Magic Dress — spectral-dressing effect with modulation and tail shaping

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: Initial release: spectral reverb/dressing effect with modulation, tail shaping and diffuse processing.

version.author: Previous Author
version.changelog: v3.5.0: Initial release.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v3.5.1: Added SurroundWindow.lua module for dedicated surround path controls. Refactored surround path UI into separate modular window. Improved code organization and maintainability.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v3.5.2: Added Full Circles mode for unlimited rotations using internal phase accumulator. Surround modes now: Vector 3-point / Circle Arc 3-point / Full Circles. Removed Speed multiplier from Circle Arc (now for arcs only), added Rotations Count & Start Angle for Full Circles mode. Fixed proper VBAP 5.1 panning with mono source distribution.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v3.5.3: Minor bug fixes and performance improvements.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v3.5.4: Fixed surround path minor issue.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v3.5.5: Performance: Added r.PreventUIRefresh() around envelope batch writes - eliminates 2-3s lag when editing pads (Reaper no longer redraws after each InsertEnvelopePoint). Performance: Increased pad drag throttle from 50ms to 80ms for consistency with surround. Performance: Fixed explicit circle segment count (32) in DrawVectorPad to avoid per-frame auto-calculation overhead.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: Added Physical Doppler Mode Improved Audio Pitch algorithm for Doppler (Grain Jitter) Added Grain Size selection for Audio Pitch/Doppler Improved Pitch Logic (DC Blocking for low end)

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v3.4.1: Rename effect to "sbp_WhooshEngine" for better clarity and branding.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v3.5.0: Added dedicated Surround Path controls (Vector/Circle) with new automation sliders. Surround output can now follow dedicated Sur Path X/Y stream from ReaWhoosh UI. Ring Modulator has been enhanced.

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v3.5.2 (2026-02-19): Added Full Circles mode for unlimited rotations using internal phase accumulator Surround modes now: Vector 3-point / Circle Arc 3-point / Full Circles Removed Speed multiplier from Circle Arc mode (3-point automation defines timing) Added Rotations Count & Start Angle parameters for Full Circles mode Fixed proper VBAP 5.1 panning with mono source distribution

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: v3.5.7 (2026-02-20): Reverb moved to true post-envelope behavior (tail keeps processing after amp envelope drops) Removed final L/R gate clamp to prevent abrupt reverb cutoff v3.5.6 (2026-02-20): Smoothed post-FX envelope release to avoid abrupt reverb cutoff Output gate release now follows Verb Tail for more natural fade-out v3.5.5 (2026-02-20): Reverb pre-delay slightly shortened for closer early tail response v3.5.4 (2026-02-20): Reverb comb-filter artifacts reduced: added internal diffusion all-pass stages Added subtle delay-time modulation in reverb tank for smoother tail v3.5.3 (2026-02-20): Reverb moved to post-filter stereo stage (no new sliders) Reverb now processes L/R independently with subtle decorrelated tails

reapack.name: sbp_VO tool.lua
reapack.desc: VO-tool: Multi-function tool for processing voiceover items in REAPER (Sorting, spacing, time control, fades, trimming, rate adjustment, and alignment).

metadata.description: Multi-function tool for processing voiceover items in REAPER (Sorting, spacing, time control, fades, trimming, rate adjustment, and alignment).

version.author: SBP & AI
version.changelog: 2.77 Major VO Tool update: consolidated workflow improvements across timeline/region handling, PRE-PROD chain processing, normalization accuracy, Restore Original recovery, and Auto-Level (Rider) development. Includes a redesigned and calibrated Rider engine with RMS/LUFS-style detection, robust gating, correct envelope-domain mapping (Track/Trim/Pre-FX/Take), multi-item reliability, and stable target lock behavior for consistent results (for example, -23 LUFS workflows) without cumulative gain drift.
